action: Strengthen the filesystem terminal journal so a successful compare-and-set synchronizes the renamed journal entry through the parent directory before reporting success.

progress.finding: Temporary-file fsync plus atomic rename does not by itself request persistence of the directory entry; parent-directory sync closes that specific durability gap on supporting filesystems.
progress.verification: 2 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical committed logic

handoff: Wire this adapter into one production peer-runtime caller, classify directory-sync failure as an indeterminate commit outcome, and add crash injection after rename and before lock release. Never retry a different terminal solely because directory sync failed after replacement.
